dataSourceInstructions:
PayerAnalytics is a Direct Lake semantic model over lh_gold_curated, scoped to the revenue-cycle / CFO persona. It exposes pre-defined DAX measures for denials, collections, days-in-AR, appeals, payer mix, and member economics. PREFER measures over raw SQL aggregations.

QUERY LANGUAGE: DAX via EVALUATE / SUMMARIZECOLUMNS / CALCULATETABLE. NOT SQL.

=== CRITICAL: TABLES YOU MAY USE (backed by Delta in lh_gold_curated) ===
fact_claim, fact_encounter, fact_prescription, fact_diagnosis,
agg_appeal_outcomes, agg_days_in_ar, agg_medication_adherence, agg_readmission_by_date, agg_revenue_by_drg,
dim_payer, dim_patient, dim_provider, dim_diagnosis, dim_medication, dim_sdoh, dim_date

=== DO NOT QUERY THESE TABLES — TMDL definitions exist but Delta backing has NOT been deployed yet ===
fact_appeal, fact_authorization, fact_capitation, fact_premium,
agg_hedis_compliance, agg_mlr_by_payer_month, agg_raf_score, agg_star_rating, agg_star_rating_overall,
bridge_provider_contract, dim_plan
If a user asks for HEDIS / MLR / RAF / Star Ratings / authorizations / capitation / premium / plan-level questions, respond that those data sources are not yet available in this environment and suggest the closest backed alternative (e.g., denial rate by payer for revenue questions).

=== KEY MEASURES ===

fact_claim (the workhorse table for the CFO):
- [Total Claims], [Total Billed], [Total Paid], [Collection Rate], [Net Collection Rate]
- [Denial Rate], [Provider Denial Count], [Avg Denial Risk], [High Risk Denials], [At Risk Revenue]
- [Avg Days to Payment], [MTD Claims], [Paid by Payment Date]
- [Appeal Success Rate], [Total Appeal Recovery]

fact_encounter (use for case-mix / DRG margin questions):
- [Total Encounters], [Total Charges], [Total Cost], [Avg Cost Per Encounter], [Total Expected Reimbursement]
- [Avg DRG Weight], [Inpatient Encounters], [Emergency Encounters]
- [Readmission Rate], [Avg Length of Stay]
- [PY Charges], [YoY Charge Growth], [YTD Charges]

fact_prescription:
- [Total Fills], [Total Rx Cost], [Avg Rx Cost Per Fill], [Generic Fill Rate], [Payer Rx Cost], [Patient Copay Total]

fact_diagnosis:
- [Unique Diagnoses], [Chronic Diagnoses], [Patients with Chronic Conditions]

agg_medication_adherence:
- [Adherent Rate], [Avg PDC Score]

dim_payer (SCD2 — measures pre-filter is_active = 1):
- [Total Payers], [Avg Reimbursement Rate], [Large Network Payers], [Commercial Payers], [Government Payers]

dim_patient (SCD2 — measures pre-filter is_current = 1):
- [Total Patients], [Chronic Patients], [Avg Patient Age]

For agg_appeal_outcomes and agg_days_in_ar (no pre-defined measures yet), use SUM/AVERAGE over their numeric columns:
- agg_appeal_outcomes: appeal_count, appeal_outcome ('Won'/'Lost'/'Pending'), total_amount_recovered, avg_amount_recovered, by payer_name and denial_reason
- agg_days_in_ar: days_in_ar_bucket, claim_count, billed_amount, by payer_name and age_bucket ('0-30','31-60','61-90','91-120','120+')

=== DAX PATTERNS ===
1. Single KPI:               EVALUATE { [Denial Rate] }
2. Sliced by dimension:       EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "Rate", [Denial Rate])
3. With filter:               EVALUATE CALCULATETABLE(SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "Risk $", [At Risk Revenue]), dim_payer[payer_type] = "Commercial")
4. Time-intelligence:         EVALUATE SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_date[year], dim_date[month_name], "Billed", [Total Billed], "Paid", [Total Paid], "Collection %", [Collection Rate])
5. TopN:                      EVALUATE TOPN(10, SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(dim_payer[payer_name], "Denial %", [Denial Rate]), [Denial Rate], DESC)

=== ROUTING TO LAKEHOUSE INSTEAD ===
Fall back to the lh_gold_curated lakehouse (SQL) when:
- Question needs row-level detail ("list the 50 highest-dollar denied claims")
- Question needs a column not exposed as a measure (e.g., specific denial_reason_codes, claim_number)
- Question requires a JOIN pattern not pre-baked into model relationships
- Question references one of the NOT-YET-BACKED tables listed above (and the user confirms a SQL workaround is OK)

=== BENCHMARKS (CFO context) ===
Denial Rate: <10% is healthy (industry median ~12%) | Collection Rate: >95% target | Days to Payment: <30 days target | Appeal Success Rate: 40-60% typical | Generic Fill Rate: >85% | Readmission Rate: <15%
userDescription: Direct Lake semantic model over lh_gold_curated scoped to the revenue-cycle / CFO persona. Contains DAX measures for denials, collections, days-in-AR, appeals, payer mix, and case-mix economics. Some TMDL tables are aspirational and not yet backed (see dataSourceInstructions).
